description: Frozen 11-record hard subset from the full 160-record five-model proof-completion panel.
intended_use: Use this manifest for post-hoc diagnostic analysis or pass@k probes on rows failed by at least three of five models in the frozen 160-record panel. Do not report it as an unbiased full-dataset benchmark.
selection_policy: Freeze the hard subset after the full 160-record one-shot leaderboard.
Include rows failed by at least three of five endpoint aliases after the same extraction and deterministic repair pipeline.
Use only as a conditional hard-subset diagnostic subset, not as the main leaderboard.

records.rationale: Four endpoint aliases failed the two-cell P0 best-constant-approximation proof.
Four endpoint aliases failed the local FEM/P0 projection unfolding proof.
Four endpoint aliases failed the general-N weighted P0 scalar-multiplication proof.
Four endpoint aliases failed the general-N mass-weighted residual cancellation proof.
Four endpoint aliases failed the Lax-Friedrichs CFL absolute-value stability proof.
Three endpoint aliases failed the general-N weighted P0 constant-average proof.
Three endpoint aliases failed the heat-equation CFL nonnegativity side-condition proof.
Three endpoint aliases failed the KdV canonical-flux constant-difference proof.
Three endpoint aliases failed the low-dimensional diagonal infinity-norm bound proof.
Three endpoint aliases failed the general-N finite-row constant-preservation proof.
Three endpoint aliases failed the finite-index centered-DC normalization proof.
